summary: FASE 2 verification (global work-schedule + tolerance + 3 status). 11/11 backend pytest passing and full Playwright UI verification passing. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py now 1351 lines — still single-file; recommend splitting (auth/employees/attendance/exports/push/settings) for maintainability.
_validate_hhmm accepts non-zero-padded hour like '9:00' (split+int parsing). Functional but inconsistent with the UI's HH:MM <input type=time> which always emits zero-padded. Not blocking.
PUT /api/settings: when HRD submits, response shape differs from owner (no {ok,applied,...}). Frontend already handles this via res.applied check. Consider documenting in API contract.
compute_status uses local TZ (TZ=Asia/Jakarta from server.py); ensure pytest server timezone consistency for future tests — handled by passing tzinfo=TZ in tests.
test_credentials: Owner: owner@company.com / password123. Created throwaway test_hrd_fase2@company.com (HRD), test_hrd_ui@company.com (HRD), test_mgr_ui@company.com (Manager) — all deleted after tests; settings restored to 09:00/17:00/15.
seed_data_creation: Throwaway HRD/Manager users created via owner POST /api/employees, cleaned up post-test. Any settings request created during HRD-flow test was approved/rejected and settings doc reset to defaults.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest /app/backend/tests/test_fase2.py covers: GET /api/settings (defaults + auth), PUT /api/settings owner direct-apply + persistence + validation (tolerance 0..120, HH:MM strict for clearly bad inputs incl '25:00','12:60','99:99'), HRD PUT->pending request with payload->owner approve applies, compute_status three-status (TZ-aware), /api/attendance/summary totals+rows include 'tolerance', xlsx 2 sheets + 'Toleransi' string present, PDF magic bytes. Playwright validated: nav-settings visible for owner+HRD, hidden for manager; Dashboard 5 cards (Total/Tepat Waktu/Toleransi/Terlambat/Tidak Hadir); Monitoring daily 5 cards; Monitoring rentang/rekap table headers include 'TOLERANSI'; Settings page (data-testid settings-page) has work-start, work-end, tolerance, settings-save-btn, live #rule-preview updates on input, save shows success toast 'Jadwal kerja berhasil disimpan', values persist on reload, no non-Tailwind console errors. Monitoring mode select values are: harian/rentang/minggu/bulan/tahun.
verified_features: PUT /api/settings as OWNER -> {ok:true, applied:true, ...}, GET reflects; validates tolerance 0..120 (400) and HH:MM (400)
PUT /api/settings as HRD -> pending request with action='settings' and payload {work_start,work_end,tolerance_minutes}; POST /api/employee-requests/{id}/approve applies the proposed settings
/api/attendance/summary/export?format=xlsx -> >=2 sheets, 'Toleransi' string present in worksheet/shared-strings XML
Frontend nav-settings: visible owner/HRD, hidden manager (HR_ROLES gating correct)
Monitoring Rentang (rekap): table headers include 'TOLERANSI'; rekap-row rendered
Settings page (data-testid=settings-page): work-start, work-end, tolerance inputs + live rule-preview reflecting new values + settings-save-btn
Owner save -> toast 'Jadwal kerja berhasil disimpan'; value persists after reload
Regression FASE 1: owner login + nav (dashboard/monitoring/employees/approvals/settings) all clickable; no non-Tailwind console errors
